prompt: A dramatic black-and-white studio portrait of a confident bearded man wearing unique, thin-framed gold round sunglasses with dark tinted lenses and a tailored dark suit, captured in a close-up composition with a shallow depth of field. He is positioned slightly to the right side of the frame, photographed at eye level with an 85mm portrait lens look. His head is turned to the left in profile view, gazing off-camera with a calm, contemplative expression, chin slightly raised. His left hand is loosely clenched near his chin, adding intensity and sophistication to the pose. The lighting is classic Rembrandt-style side lighting, soft yet highly directional, creating deep cinematic shadows across the right side of his face and neck while illuminating the left side of his face, forehead, nose bridge, and knuckles. Strong catchlights in the eyes are essential. The portrait should feel moody, elegant, and editorial, with rich tonal contrast and crisp texture detail. His beard is meticulously groomed with visible individual hairs and realistic skin texture including pores, eyelashes, and subtle facial lines. He has a messy hair and wears a luxury metal wristwatch on his left wrist with reflective metallic surfaces, visible bezel details, and a polished bracelet. On the cuff of his dark jacket, a silver-toned Roman numeral “III” detail appears vertically in a bold serif style. The suit fabric is matte black with subtle folds and stitched cuff details. The watch crystal and metal edges catch highlights naturally while the clothing remains mostly matte. The overall palette is monochrome only: deep blacks, bright whites, and rich greys with very high contrast. The background is a dark studio backdrop with soft mottled texture fading into near-black shadows and a heavy vignette on the right side. Slight soft-focus blur appears in the extreme foreground near the bottom edge, adding depth and realism. Ultra-realistic photography, cinematic portrait style, luxury fashion editorial aesthetic, extremely detailed beard texture, realistic skin micro-details, sharp focus on the eyes and face, high dynamic range monochrome tones, no visible noise, no compression artifacts.
